Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=S-methyl-L-methionine + L-selenocysteine = Se-methyl-L-selenocysteine + L-methionine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:26341, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57843, ChEBI:CHEBI:57844, ChEBI:CHEBI:58252, ChEBI:CHEBI:58531; EC=2.1.1.280; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:15863700, ECO:0000269|PubMed:17391716};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Catalyzes the methylation of DL- and L-selenocysteine with S-methylmethionine as donor. Also methylates DL-homocysteine, DL- and L-cysteine in vitro. May be involved in selenium detoxification. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:15863700, ECO:0000269|PubMed:17391716}.
